summary: Batch decomp PR that matched six functions and improved twelve more partial/unmatched items across camera, fighter, game-mode/results/opening, stage, interface text/HUD, menu, and toy/trophy code. The decomp.dev GALE01 report recorded matched code at 69.96%, up +0.06% and +2216 bytes, with new 100% matches for Camera_80030E44, ftAction_80073008, fn_8017A9B4, un_80318B1C, ftNn_Init_80123954, and gm_801A9DD0. The diff is mostly matching-focused codegen tuning: exact narrow types and casts, local lifetime/register-shape changes, loop-shape changes, helper/inlining control, direct global access, and small header/prototype corrections.
what_changed: Matched Camera_80030E44 by removing the local Camera* alias and accessing cm_80452C68 fields directly.

Matched ftAction_80073008 by changing color_anim to f32, removing PAD_STACK, computing a damage multiplier from charge_rate, casting color_anim to s32 at the call, and passing charge_frames as the second float argument.

Matched ftNn_Init_80123954 by reshaping locals, removing PAD_STACK, using ftIceClimberAttributes earlier, splitting dx/dy squares, casting the distance threshold, adjusting the switch/default coverage, and changing the Nana ground/air transition call sequence.

Matched gm_801A9DD0 and updated gmopening.h by changing the height argument from int to u16, using Scissor-shaped viewport storage cast to HSD_RectS16*, and introducing explicit roll/near/far/top/bottom locals.
Matched fn_8017A9B4 by introducing a static inline helper for HSD_ImageDesc setup and passing dimension pointers through u16* casts.
Matched un_80318B1C by storing sort values through *(s32*) &grid->sort[start].val instead of direct val assignment.
Improved gmCamera_801A292C by replacing an inlined snapshot update loop with gmCamera_801A25C8(), adding local aliases for gmCamera_80479BC8.gcus and gmCamera_803DA630, and using MIN for x44.

Improved fn_80175A94 from 8.25% to 99.66% by changing result text position sources, using jobjs[12] instead of jobjs[10] for mode x5==3, using x4C[slot].x instead of y, reshaping switch logic into if/else chains, and nesting fn_8017AD78(fn_8017ADA8(slot)).

Improved ft_800852B0 by modeling ftData_UnkCountStruct pointers via casts and byte offsets from CostumeListsForeachCharacter, using direct indexed CostumeListsForeachCharacter access, and preserving a zero local new_var for loop initialization and reset calls.
Improved grInishie2_801FD9EC with GET_GROUND(gobj) reloads, temp_vec aliases for stage translation vectors, and reordered locals.

Improved un_80303FD4 in textlib with #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on, assignment-expression initialization, cached loop values, pointer iteration over sentinel-terminated x8 entries, and local aliases.
Improved fn_802FA6C4 by changing one loop to i != 130 and making the cleanup loop count down from 129 to 0.
Improved un_802FF570 by introducing a struct pointer and HSD_Text* local before testing and hiding text.
Improved un_803147C4 by memzeroing the raw data offset before casting to HSD_GObj**, and by assigning the GObj object kind through a u8 temporary.
Improved mn_8022FB88 by copying arg0 into an int local before computing the tens and ones digit animation requests.
Improved ftKb_SpecialN_800EED50 with an explicit (u8) cast before efAsync_LoadSync.
Updated toy.h so extern char un_804D5A8C[] became extern char un_804D5A8C[4].
smart_moves: Used exact-width types and casts where the assembly was sensitive: gm_801A9DD0 height as u16, efAsync_LoadSync argument as u8, color_anim as f32 with s32 cast, and sort value stores through s32*.

Treated local aliases as codegen levers rather than purely readability choices: Camera_80030E44 matched only after direct cm_80452C68 field access, while other functions improved with carefully placed aliases such as unk, tbl, temp_vec, thing, and new_var.
Reused an existing helper, gmCamera_801A25C8(), instead of open-coding the same snapshot loop in gmCamera_801A292C, which significantly improved that partial match.
Introduced a static inline helper in gmresultplayer to force the repeated HSD_ImageDesc initialization pattern for fn_8017A9B4.
Controlled loop shape directly where MWCC branch structure mattered: i != 130, reverse cleanup from 129, pointer-walking until sentinel 9, and cached condition values.
Kept header declarations in sync with matching discoveries, especially gm_801A9DD0's u16 prototype and the fixed-size un_804D5A8C[4] extern.
decomp_lessons: Do not assume a temporary pointer to a global is harmless; direct global field access can be required for the right load/register pattern.
Small type corrections can unlock full matches. Narrow argument types, float-to-int conversions, and explicit pointer casts should be tested before adding artificial stack padding.
For repeated descriptor setup code, a small static inline wrapper can produce a closer duplicate code pattern than manually repeating the statements.
Header and extern declarations are part of matching work: prototype widths and array sizes can change downstream codegen and should be updated when evidence supports them.
Loop form is a matching primitive. Equivalent C loops using <, !=, decrementing order, or pointer iteration can produce different branches and register allocation.
When a manual block resembles an existing local helper, try calling the helper; it may match the original source structure better than preserving a decompiled inline loop.
Use pragmas sparingly but deliberately when the diff shows MWCC inlining behavior blocking progress; this PR used #pragma dont_inline around un_80303FD4.
Placeholder locals such as new_var can be legitimate matching scaffolding, but future cleanup should rename them if better semantics become known.
naming_conventions: Preserved project address-suffixed unknown function names such as gm_801A9DD0, fn_8017A9B4, un_80318B1C, un_80303FD4, and fn_802FA6C4.
Kept subsystem prefixes consistent with existing code: Camera_, ftAction_, ftNn_Init_, ftKb_SpecialN_, gmCamera_, grInishie2_, mn_, and un_.
Header declarations retained address comments such as /* 1A9DD0 */ in gmopening.h.
The diff introduced temporary matching names like new_var, new_var2, new_var3, new_var4, and inline1; evidence does not show semantic reviewer-approved names for those locals.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Direct global access: cm_80452C68.xA0, cm_80452C68._8C, and cm_80452C68._B0 replaced a Camera* local in Camera_80030E44.
Exact conversion order: ftAction_80073008 computes dmg_mult = (1 / 256.0f) * charge_rate and passes (s32) color_anim, charge_frames, dmg_mult.
Prototype narrowing: gm_801A9DD0 changed from (HSD_GObj*, u16, int, int, int) to (HSD_GObj*, u16, u16, int, int).
Viewport storage trick: gm_801A9DD0 fills a Scissor-like struct and casts it to HSD_RectS16* for HSD_CObjSetViewport.
Inline helper extraction: fn_8017A9B4 uses inline1(HSD_ImageDesc* imgs, int slot, u16* w, u16* h) to reset image_ptr and call lb_800121FC.
Pointer-cast array indexing: fn_8017A9B4 passes (u16*) disp->state.dim_w1 + lookup and similar height pointers.
Contiguous data modeling: ft_800852B0 derives ftData_UnkCountStruct* ranges from CostumeListsForeachCharacter[FTKIND_MAX] and a byte offset of 5940.
Loop branch shaping: ifstock changed for (i = 0; i < 130; i++) to i != 130 and changed cleanup to for (i = 129; i >= 0; i--).
Sentinel pointer walking: textlib's un_80303FD4 iterates x8 entries with a pointer until x0 == 9.
Local reloads/macros: grInishie2_801FD9EC uses GET_GROUND(gobj) in specific expressions and before translation vector updates.
Inlining control: un_80303FD4 is wrapped with #pragma push, #pragma dont_inline on, and #pragma pop.
review_feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported 6 new 100% matches and 12 improvements in unmatched items.
Bot report headline: GALE01 matched code 69.96% (+0.06%, +2216 bytes).
Author-listed verification: python configure.py --require-protos and ninja.
follow_up_queries: Search for other viewport/setup functions where HSD_RectS16 versus Scissor field layout and u16 dimensions may affect matching.
Audit callers and prototypes of gm_801A9DD0 to ensure the second dimension is consistently treated as u16.
Investigate the contiguous layout around CostumeListsForeachCharacter, ftData_Table_Unk0, and ftData_UnkIntPairs, especially the 5940-byte offset used in ft_800852B0.
Revisit near-matches fn_80175A94, fn_802FA6C4, un_803147C4, mn_8022FB88, and gmCamera_801A292C for final cleanup if later context appears.
Check the real type of grid->sort[start].val in toy/trophy code because un_80318B1C required s32 pointer stores to match.
Rename placeholder matching locals like new_var and inline1 if later struct or source evidence reveals semantic names.
